timing_policy.method: Generate one natural Brazilian Portuguese utterance per segment, place it at the segment start, and preserve silence between segments.
fit_order: Tighten the Brazilian Portuguese wording without changing meaning.
Regenerate with pronunciation or punctuation adjustments.
Apply no more than 10 percent time compression when editorial changes cannot solve the overrun.
do_not: Synthesize each original VTT cue as a separate utterance.
Move narration across a visual transition without reviewing the picture.
Map the original English audio stream into the localized video.

audio_mix.method: The source audio stream will not be mapped. The aligned Brazilian Portuguese voice-only master will be mixed over viacheslavstarostin-educational-presentation-tutorial-music-357862.mp3, normalized to -27 LUFS. Music fades in, sidechain-ducks beneath narration, restores between phrases, and fades over the final four seconds.
audio_mix.review_warning: Confirm narration level, pronunciation, music balance, ducking transitions, and the final fade.

editorial_notes: Corrected clear AI-caption recognition errors before Brazilian Portuguese translation.
Preserved official OCP product, program, and organization names in English where required.

segments.english: In 2011, we opened the black box and shared the blueprints. But blueprints do not build themselves.
segments.portuguese: Em 2011, abrimos a caixa-preta e publicamos projetos. Mas era preciso construí-los.

segments.english: To actually change the industry, we needed an innovation engine powered by openness. What we needed was a community.
segments.portuguese: Para realmente mudar a indústria, precisávamos de um motor de inovação movido pela abertura. O que precisávamos era de uma comunidade.

segments.english: Today, the Open Compute Project is not just a library of specifications. It is a living community driven by a shared goal: creating open solutions for data center operators facing extreme scaling challenges.
segments.portuguese: Hoje, o Open Compute Project não é apenas uma biblioteca de especificações. É uma comunidade viva impulsionada por um objetivo comum: criar soluções abertas para operadores de data centers que enfrentam desafios extremos de escalabilidade.

segments.english: Putting thousands of engineers in one room produces many great ideas, but that brainpower must be properly channeled.
segments.portuguese: Milhares de engenheiros juntos geram ótimas ideias, mas esse talento precisa ser bem direcionado.

segments.english: The work of OCP happens in specialized project groups. Think of them as engineering departments.
segments.portuguese: O trabalho do OCP acontece em grupos de projetos especializados. Pense neles como departamentos de engenharia.

segments.english: Some teams focus entirely on Rack & Power, others on Cooling Environments, and still others write open-source networking specifications. There are many more.
segments.portuguese: Algumas equipes se dedicam ao Rack & Power, outras ao Cooling Environments e outras ainda elaboram especificações abertas de redes. E há muitos outros grupos.

segments.english: This is where the magic happens.
segments.portuguese: É aqui que a mágica acontece.

segments.english: We put the hyperscaler that builds and operates these massive data centers in the same room as the vendor that builds the hardware and the industry using that equipment.
segments.portuguese: Colocamos o hiperescalador que constrói e opera esses enormes data centers na mesma sala que o fornecedor que constrói o hardware e a indústria que utiliza esse equipamento.

segments.english: They debate physics, iterate on designs, and solve problems together before a single piece of metal is stamped.
segments.portuguese: Eles debatem a física, refinam projetos e resolvem problemas juntos antes que uma única peça de metal seja estampada.

segments.english: But it is not the Wild West. Before any design becomes an official OCP specification, it must pass the technical gatekeepers: the Steering Committee.
segments.portuguese: Mas não é o Velho Oeste. Antes de qualquer projeto se tornar uma especificação oficial OCP, ele deve passar pelos guardiões técnicos: o Comitê Diretor.

segments.english: They are a panel of elected industry experts who rigorously review every submission.
segments.portuguese: Eles são um painel de especialistas eleitos do setor que analisam rigorosamente cada envio.

segments.english: If a design does not meet the strict tenets of efficiency, impact, openness, scale, and sustainability, it goes straight back to the drawing board.
segments.portuguese: Se um projeto não atende aos princípios rígidos de eficiência, impacto, abertura, escala e sustentabilidade, ele volta direto para a prancheta.

segments.english: Once the committee approves the specification, it is locked in.
segments.portuguese: Após a aprovação do comitê, a especificação fica estabelecida.

segments.english: Vendors can then manufacture the physical hardware, earn the OCP Accepted mark, and list it on the OCP Marketplace for the world to see, buy, and deploy.
segments.portuguese: Os fornecedores podem então fabricar o hardware físico, obter a marca OCP Accepted e listá-lo no OCP Marketplace para que o mundo veja, compre e implante.

segments.english: The community identifies the bottleneck, the project groups design the solution, and the committee ensures quality.
segments.portuguese: A comunidade identifica o gargalo, os grupos do projeto desenham a solução e o comitê garante a qualidade.

segments.english: That is how we move the industry forward.
segments.portuguese: É assim que impulsionamos a indústria.

segments.english: Now that you know how the engine works, let us talk about my favorite topic: hardware.
segments.portuguese: Agora que você sabe como funciona o mecanismo, vamos falar sobre meu assunto favorito: hardware.

language_policy.dialect: Natural Brazilian Portuguese for a professional technical audience.
language_policy.acronyms: Use IA in spoken Portuguese; retain OCP and product acronyms where technically appropriate.
language_policy.numbers: Preserve every source year, percentage, voltage, and monetary value exactly.
language_policy.tone: Warm, authoritative, concise, and natural for spoken Brazilian Portuguese.
